creator: void@f-m.fm
text:
(In reply to Philip Paeps from comment #2)
(In reply to Philip Paeps from comment #2)
Hi,

I had to use curl -6 because of the modification to rc.conf explained previously.
I have attached the tcpdump output (as plain txt rather than a pcap)

In the curl terminal, this was the result:

curl -6 -vk -H 'Host git.freebsd.org' https://gitmir.fra.freebsd.org/
* Host gitmir.fra.freebsd.org:443 was resolved.
* IPv6: 2604:1380:4091:a001::24ca:1
* IPv4: (none)
*   Trying [2604:1380:4091:a001::24ca:1]:443...
* Connected to gitmir.fra.freebsd.org (2604:1380:4091:a001::24ca:1) port 443
* ALPN: curl offers h2,http/1.1
* TLSv1.3 (OUT), TLS handshake, Client hello (1):
* Recv failure: Connection reset by peer
* OpenSSL SSL_connect: Connection reset by peer in connection to gitmir.fra.freebsd.org:443 
* Closing connection
curl: (35) Recv failure: Connection reset by peer

It seems I send with a MSS value of 1440 and the site replies with a MSS of 8940.
